meta.purpose: PPT arrow asset pack 04 perspective main-chain, process chevron, connector route, and outline backbone arrows for architecture, process, convergence, split, feedback, and platform-channel pages.
meta.license_policy: Self-made PPT assets; see assets/ppt_arrow_pack4_sources/README.md and index.csv.
